meta.description: Deterministic inventory joining boundary contracts, contract-to-producer matrix, and support manifest, extended with static discovery over handler, runtime, kernel, supervisor, execution, and orchestration source trees. Support labels are recorded but non-authoritative — only landed producer paths constitute adoption evidence. Projections are explicitly tagged as non-authority.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Invoked when current_state is STATE_PLANNED and step='critique' is run. The runtime dispatches parallel critiques, runs critiques, potentially triggers adaptive routing, and calls _finish_step.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s critique (or auto driver transitions from plan)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted synchronously within _finish_step in handlers/shared.py (step not in {execute, review})

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Emitted on final batch when transition is terminal (not blocked). The dispatcher emits aggregate promotion receipt with child_trace_refs including execution.json and task_count.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (final batch completion)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted within handle_execute_auto_loop on terminal batch completion

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Emitted when execute approval gate clears (_enforce_approval_gate returns APPROVED). The receipt is observational only — evidence-only, does not affect branch decisions. Emitted BEFORE batch dispatch.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (after approval gate clears)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted before batch dispatch, in handle_execute after approval gate passes. Not part of _finish_step (execute is excluded from auto-receipt in _finish_step).

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Emitted when execute approval gate fails (missing confirmation or missing approval). Evidence-only receipt before CliError propagates.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (when approval gate fails)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted in except CliError handler before re-raise. Not part of _finish_step.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Emitted for each non-final, non-blocked batch within handle_execute_auto_loop. The batch dispatcher emits this when next_step_decision.transition is not BLOCKED and not terminal.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute --batch <N> (or auto loop for non-final batch)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted within handle_execute_auto_loop in execute/batch.py for each intermediate batch

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Emitted when response.get('result') == 'blocked' in handle_execute. The receipt includes blocked_task_ids, deviations, and optionally the blocked_retry_decision.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (when batch result is blocked)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted after clear_active_step and save_state_merge_meta, within handle_execute when blocked

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Emitted when robustness is 'bare' or 'light' without deferred_must, and response.state is STATE_EXECUTED with no review step in workflow. Two call-sites: (1) bare robustness skips review entirely, (2) light robustness generates stub review artifact and skips review.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (bare/light robustness, no review in workflow)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted within handle_execute after no-review terminal decision, before returning response

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Emitted when next_step_decision.transition is BLOCKED. The dispatcher emits a partial receipt with outcome PARTIAL and child trace refs.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (when batch is blocked by quality gates)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted within handle_execute_auto_loop when transition is BLOCKED

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Emitted when force_fresh is True (rework re-execution or blocked retry). Emitted before batch dispatch, with session_freshness=True.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s execute (when retry requires fresh session)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted before batch dispatch in handle_execute, when force_fresh is triggered

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Terminal or continuation projection visible in finalize policy metadata. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s finalize

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found.
No auto-match mechanism.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Finalize publishes canonical plan artifacts. The finalize handler (handlers/finalize.py:handle_finalize) handles finalize. No explicit boundary receipt emission found for finalize_artifacts.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s finalize
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Not emitted — declared only. Finalize is not in _FRONT_HALF_BOUNDARY_ID_BY_PHASE and no explicit boundary receipt found.

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found in finalize handler.
No auto-match mechanism for finalize phase.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Revise fallback evidence persisted as declarative contract when baseline test selection is unresolved. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s finalize (when baseline selection is unresolved)

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found.
No auto-match mechanism.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Invoked when current_state is STATE_CRITIQUED and step='gate' is run. The handler calls run_gate_checks, build_gate_signals, and evaluates the gate outcome. The receipt is only emitted when recommendation is iterate/retry/revise (gate_to_revise boundary). For proceed outcomes, no boundary receipt is emitted (handler proceeds to execute).
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s gate (or auto driver transitions from critique)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted synchronously within _finish_step in handlers/shared.py (step not in {execute, review}). Gate-specific: gate_summary authority data is included in receipt details.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Override 'abort' action in handle_override. The handler maps action to state transitions and writes state.json. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan override abort <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: No auto-match mechanism for override phases. Contract has receipt_required=False so this is by design, but the contract is declared without a producer path.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Override 'adopt-execution' action. Writes state with override entry. No boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan override adopt-execution <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Override 'force-proceed' action. The override handler writes state.json with override entry but no boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan override force-proceed <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Protected actions and explicit human gates. No boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan override human-gate <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Override 'recover-blocked' action. Writes state with override entry. No boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan override recover-blocked <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Override 'replan' action. Writes state with override entry. No boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan override replan <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Override 'resume-clarify' action. Writes state with override entry. No boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan override resume-clarify <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Suspension/waiver authority. Handled via override mechanism. No boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan override suspension <plan>

visible_non_conformant.detail: Overrides have receipt_required=False. No producer emission path.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Parent rejoin happens when tiebreaker decision resolves and the parent workflow resumes. No explicit boundary receipt emission was found for this transition.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: Auto transition after tiebreaker_decision resolves (parent workflow resumes)

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no producer emission path found. Parent rejoin is an implicit transition.
No auto-match entry for parent_rejoin phase.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Invoked when current_state is STATE_PREPPED and step='plan' is run. Calls _write_plan_version with _validate_generated_plan_or_raise, then _finish_step which emits the boundary receipt.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s plan (or auto driver transitions from prep)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted synchronously within _finish_step in handlers/shared.py (step not in {execute, review})

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Invoked when current_state is STATE_INITIALIZED and step='prep' is run. The handler calls _build_prep_clarify_signal + _apply_prep_signal to determine next_state. MOCK path (prep.json) and orchestrated path (run_prep_orchestration from orchestration/prep_research.py) both call _finish_step which emits the boundary receipt.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s prep (or auto driver transitions from init)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted synchronously within _finish_step in handlers/shared.py (step not in {execute, review})

authority_references.authority_source: _boundary_authority_records in handlers/shared.py, sources actor/role from auth_metadata or worker channel

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Replan authority is triggered when tiebreaker/escalation decisions route to replan. The override handler (handlers/override.py) handles 'replan' action via _override_action_entry, but no explicit boundary receipt emission for this specific contract was found in the override handler.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan override replan <plan>
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Not emitted — declared only. Contract has receipt_required=False.

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared with receipt_required=False but no producer emission path confirmed. Override handler maps 'replan' action to state transitions but does not call a boundary receipt function for this specific contract.
No auto-match entry for replan_authority phase.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Cap exhaustion outcomes carry explicit authority records. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s review (cap exhaustion scenarios)

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found.
No auto-match mechanism.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Review fan-out children produce durable outputs. The review handler (handlers/review.py:handle_review) does not appear to emit explicit boundary receipts for child_outputs. The review step is excluded from auto-receipt in _finish_step.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s review (during child output processing)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Not emitted — declared only. Review is excluded from _finish_step auto-receipt and no explicit boundary receipt call found.

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but review handler does not emit explicit boundary receipts. Review step is excluded from _finish_step auto-receipt (step is 'review'). No write_boundary_receipt call found in handlers/review.py for review_child_outputs.
No _FRONT_HALF_BOUNDARY_ID_BY_PHASE entry (review is not a front-half phase) and no auto-match mechanism exists.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Deferred-human review records suspension and resume evidence. The verifiability handler (handlers/verifiability.py:handle_verify_human) handles human verification. No explicit boundary receipt for the review→human boundary was found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s review (when human verification is deferred)

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found for review_human_verification.
No auto-match mechanism.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Review reducer promotion when fan-in reducer promotes child outputs into canonical review payload. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s review (reducer promotion stage)

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found in review handler.
No auto-match mechanism for review phase states.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Triggered when review_verdict is 'needs_rework'. The review handler preserves raw rework verdicts via _preserve_raw_review_rework_verdict. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s review (when review finds needs_rework)

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found. Review rework verdict is persisted in review.json but no evidence-only boundary receipt is emitted.
No auto-match mechanism.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Invoked when current_state is STATE_GATED and step='revise' is run (gate recommended iterate). The handler calls _write_plan_version for revised plan, then _finish_step.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s revise (or auto driver transitions from gate iterate)
matrix_metadata.receipt_timing: Emitted synchronously within _finish_step in handlers/shared.py (step not in {execute, review})

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Tiebreaker sub-pipeline: challenger step runs within tiebreaker_run after researcher. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s tiebreaker_run → internal challenger step

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found. Tiebreaker sub-steps have no per-step receipt machinery.
No auto-match entry for tiebreaker_challenger phase.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Tiebreaker sub-pipeline: decision step within tiebreaker_decide emits tiebreaker_decisions.json. No explicit boundary receipt emission found for the decision→parent transition.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s tiebreaker_decide → internal decision step

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found for tiebreaker_decision_to_parent.
No auto-match entry for tiebreaker_decision phase.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Tiebreaker sub-pipeline: researcher step runs within tiebreaker_run. No explicit auto-matcher in _FRONT_HALF_BOUNDARY_ID_BY_PHASE. The tiebreaker implementation in handlers/_tiebreaker_impl.py and orchestration/tiebreaker_runtime.py does not call _emit_boundary_receipt or _emit_execute_boundary_receipt for the internal researcher→challenger transition.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s tiebreaker_run → internal researcher step

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared in BOUNDARY_CONTRACTS but no _emit_boundary_receipt call found for tiebreaker_researcher_to_challenger. The tiebreaker sub-pipeline uses internal state transitions without boundary receipts per sub-step.
_FRONT_HALF_BOUNDARY_ID_BY_PHASE only covers prep/plan/critique/gate/revise. S3 phases (including tiebreaker_researcher) have no auto-match entry.

matrix_metadata.applicability_rules: Tiebreaker sub-pipeline: synthesis step runs within tiebreaker_decide. No explicit boundary receipt emission found.
matrix_metadata.invocation_identity: megaplan run <plan> -s tiebreaker_decide → internal synthesis step

visible_non_conformant.detail: Contract declared but no boundary receipt emission found. Tiebreaker sub-steps have no per-step receipt machinery.
No auto-match entry for tiebreaker_synthesis phase.

current_state_assertions.description: Machine-verifiable assertions about the current state of the WBC boundary inventory. These encode known producer counts, exclusion rules, and emission hazards so that regressions are caught by tests.

front_half_producers.description: Known front-half producer entry-point functions: handle_prep, handle_plan, handle_critique, handle_revise, handle_gate. These are the primary producer entry points for PREP, PLAN, CRITIQUE, REVISE, and GATE phases.

execute_batch_producers.description: Known execute/batch producer functions: handle_execute, handle_execute_one_batch, handle_execute_auto_loop, handle_step, handle_execute_batch, execute_batch, monitor_execution_batch, observe_execution. These are the primary execution-phase producer entry points.

execute_review_auto_exclusion.description: handle_execute and handle_review are back-half producers (EXECUTE/REVIEW phases) and must NOT appear in the front-half producer set. This auto-exclusion is verified by checking that neither function appears in KNOWN_FRONT_HALF_PRODUCERS.
